---
title: "Analisis de Escarificacion de semilla de garbanzo"
author: "G1"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-expand: true
    toc-depth: 4
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    self-contained: true
    code-fold: true
    output-file: "ESM"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
execute: 
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: true
---


# Project Setup

```{r}
#| label:  setup

source('https://inkaverse.com/setup.r')
```


# Data import

```{r}
gs <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tqNI7-wBtEgbi_9fahcp5hUVrbRrasQ1totp7qwQ82s/edit?gid=889807040#gid=889807040" %>% 
  as_sheets_id()

fb <- gs %>% 
  range_read(ss = .,sheet = "fb")
```


# Research Objectives
## calcular indices de germinacion

```{r}
# 1. Tu limpieza de datos previa
fb[fb < 0] <- 0
dias <- grep("^ger_", colnames(fb), value = TRUE)
if(length(dias) > 1) {
  for(i in 2:length(dias)) {
    fb[[dias[i]]] <- pmax(fb[[dias[i]]], fb[[dias[i-1]]])
  }
}

# --- AQUÍ LA SOLUCIÓN: CARGAR LA LIBRERÍA ---
library(GerminaR)

# 2. Análisis acumulativo (Ahora sí funcionará)
gsm <- ger_summary(
  factors = c("escarificacion", "rep"),
  SeedN = "seeds",
  evalName = "ger_",
  cumulative = TRUE,
  data = as.data.frame(fb)
)
```


# Análisis puntual de la germinación
## Porcentaje de la germinacion 
```{r}
#1. Análisis de varianza
av <- aov(grp ~ ntreat * escarificacion, data = gsm)

# 2. Prueba de comparación de medias (SNK)
mc_grp <- ger_testcomp(aov = av
                       , comp = c("ntreat", "escarificacion")
                       , type = "snk"
                       )

# 3. Mostrar resultado en tabla
mc_grp$table %>% 
   kable(caption = "Germination percentage mean comparison")
```


# Gráfico de barras
```{r}
grp_plot <- mc_grp$table %>% 
   fplot(data = .
        , type = "bar"
        , x = "escarificacion"         
        , y = "grp"           
        , group = "ntreat"     
        , ylimits = c(0, 120, 20) 
        , ylab = "Germination ('%')"
        , xlab = "Escarificacion"
        , glab = "ntreat"
        , error = "ste"       
        , sig = "sig"      
        , color = TRUE       
        )

# gráfico 
grp_plot
```


## Tiempo medio de Germinación
```{r}
library(GerminaR)
gsm <- ger_summary(factors = c("escarificacion", "rep")
                   , SeedN = "seeds"
                   , evalName = "ger_"
                   , cumulative = TRUE
                   , data = fb
                   )

print(gsm)
```


## ANOVA
```{r}
# Análisis de varianza (ANOVA) 

av <- aov(mgt ~ ntreat * escarificacion + rep, data = gsm)

# Prueba de comparación de medias 
mc_mgt <- ger_testcomp(aov = av
                       , comp = c("ntreat", "escarificacion")
                       , type = "snk"
                       )

# Mostrar tabla
mc_mgt$table %>% 
   kable(caption = "Mean germination time comparison")
```


## Gráfico de barras 

```{r}
mgt_plot <- mc_mgt$table %>% 
   fplot(data = .
        , type = "bar" 
        , x = "ntreat"               
        , y = "mgt"                  
        , group = "escarificacion"   
        , ylimits = c(0, 12, 1)      
        , ylab = "Tiempo Medio de Germiancion (días)"
        , xlab = "ntreat" 
        , glab = "Escarificacion"     
        , sig = "sig"                
        , error = "ste"              
        , color = TRUE               
        )

# Mostrar el gráfico en el panel "Plots"
mgt_plot
```


# Análisis acumulativo de la germinación
## Analisis en el tiempo

```{r}
# data frame with percentage or relative germination in time by NaCl

git <- ger_intime(Factor = "escarificacion"
                  , SeedN = "seeds"
                  , evalName = "ger_"
                  , method = "percentage"
                  , data = as.data.frame(fb)
                  )

# data result

git %>% 
   head(10) %>% 
   kable(caption = "Cumulative germination by nacl factor")
```


```{r}
# graphic germination in time by NaCl

nacl <- git %>% 
   fplot(data = .
        , type = "line"
        , x = "evaluation"
        , y = "mean"
        , group = "escarificacion"
        , ylimits = c(0, 110, 10)
        , ylab = "Germination ('%')"
        , xlab = "Day"
        , glab = "ntreat"
        , color = T
        , error = "ste"
        )
nacl
```
